question: According to the chart data, during which period did the temperature drop by a larger amount?

options.C: Both periods have about the same temperature decrease
options.D: The change is too irregular to compare these periods

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2007-2010: 21.9°C → 16.3°C (-5.6°C); 2012-2015: 15.4°C → 10.0°C (-5.4°C).
